title: ericameria parryi var. monocephala
intro: Ericameria parryi var. monocephala, also known as single-headed or one-headed Parry's goldenrod, is a perennial shrub that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Ericameria parryi var. monocephala have been linked to reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, making it a potential natural remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and sinusitis. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
